title: UriopsPvP
description:
A PvP pack made by Uriop951.
Of course the best one.
body:
This is my new and first resource pack. 

Textures:
Darker Netherite

Ancient debris and netherite blocks

Upgrade Smithing template

Horse armor
-All made into purple and black theme
